positive: An intricate, stylized geometric woodland scene, featuring silhouettes of stylized deer, abstract forest canopies, and winding paths, designed as a repeating, tileable pattern. The composition should be centered, symmetrical, and highly detailed with strong use of negative space. Style: Minimalist contemporary vector art mixed with Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics. Color Palette: Deep forest emerald green, charcoal black, and muted cream. Lighting: Flat, high-contrast studio lighting to emphasize clean lines and silhouettes. Aspect Ratio: Perfect square, suitable for printing on apparel. Print details: Crisp edges, perfect registration, high contrast.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, lowres, messy, grainy, cartoon, photorealism
